nasb.text: They shall therefore keep My charge, so that they will not bear sin because of it and die thereby because they profane it; I am the Lord who sanctifies them.

esv.text: They shall therefore keep my charge, lest they bear sin for it and die thereby when they profane it: I am the Lord who sanctifies them.

cnv.text: 他們要謹守我的命令，免得他們因褻瀆，擔罪而死；我是使他們分別為聖的耶和華。

ccb.text: 他们要遵守我的命令，免得他们犯罪，因违背我的命令而死亡。我是使他们圣洁的耶和华。
